keyEvents.text: Goal! Czechia 1, South Africa 0. Michal Sadílek (Czechia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Alexandr Sojka.
Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Thalente Mbatha (South Africa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, South Africa. Relebohile Mofokeng replaces Jayden Adams.
Substitution, Czechia. Pavel Sulc replaces Vladimír Darida.
Substitution, Czechia. Jaroslav Zeleny replaces Alexandr Sojka.
Substitution, South Africa. Evidence Makgopa replaces Iqraam Rayners.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Soucek replaces Michal Sadílek.
Substitution, Czechia. Lukás Provod replaces Adam Hlozek.
Ladislav Krejcí (Czechia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Czechia. David Zima replaces Lukás Cerv.
Goal! Czechia 1, South Africa 1. Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, South Africa. Kamogelo Sebelebele replaces Thapelo Maseko.
Amar Dedic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Edin Dzeko (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ivan Basic replaces Benjamin Tahirovic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Esmir Bajraktarevic replaces Edin Dzeko.
Nico Elvedi (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Switzerland. Djibril Sow replaces Michel Aebischer.
Substitution, Switzerland. Johan Manzambi replaces Dan Ndoye.
Substitution, Switzerland. Rubén Vargas replaces Fabian Rieder.
Goal! Switzerland 1, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Johan Manzambi (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Tarik Muharemovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the red card.
Goal! Switzerland 2, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Rubén Vargas (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Breel Embolo.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Jovo Lukic replaces Ermedin Demirovic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Amir Hadziahmetovic replaces Ivan Sunjic.
Substitution, Switzerland. Luca Jaquez replaces Silvan Widmer.
Substitution, Switzerland. Cedric Itten replaces Breel Embolo.
Goal! Switzerland 3, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Johan Manzambi (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Rubén Vargas.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ermin Mahmic replaces Kerim Alajbegovic.
Goal! Switzerland 3, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1. Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal following a corner.
Goal! Switzerland 4, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1. Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
